title: IP Protection Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger ip protection foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: IP Protection Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: IP Protection Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good ip protection foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
IP Protection Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
